initial_access_vector: Privileged AWS credentials stolen from an IT employee's LastPass password manager (alleged insider threat)
persistence_mechanism: Root administrator access to all AWS accounts plus forged SSO cookies using stolen signing secrets
privilege_escalation: Stolen credentials already held root/administrative privileges in AWS
